blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 52°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
